title: You Are Not Alone A conversation on being a freak in our
display_title: You Are Not Alone A conversation on being a freak in our
wikitext: []: You Are Not Alone: A conversation on being a freak in our...             Quote Post by Angel of Will » Wed Oct 10, 2012 8:12 pm I didn't post this in the utterly off-topic section, because I thought it was serious and pertinent enough to the themes of Evangelion to post it here. A mod can decide if there is a better place for it. This is an online friend that I've become acquainted with rather recently, but have had meaningful and insightful conversations with. He lives with depression on a daily basis, but faces it with a delightful peculiarity... But rather than describing it, please watch this video he just put out on Youtube. It's one of the best logs I've ever listened to. If you appreciate Evangelion for its themes, I think you will appreciate this as well: "You Are Not Alone: A Conversation On Being A Freak In Our Modern World" http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P6JGOBlxBQU&feature=autoshare I encourage a discussion of these themes common to Nathan's real-world situation and Eva's characters, as obviously well as the real world problems they represented by the hand of Anno as the author.
